message:
fix: upgrade tailwindcss 3->4 and typescript 5->6 (#9750)

* fix: upgrade typescript from 5.9.3 to 6.0.3

Update ignoreDeprecations from 5.0 to 6.0 in tsconfig.json
to silence baseUrl deprecation warning in TypeScript 6.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: upgrade tailwindcss 3.4.19 -> 4.2.4 and typescript 5.9.3 -> 6.0.3

Major version bumps for both dependencies:

tailwindcss v4:
- Migrated CSS from @tailwind directives to @import 'tailwindcss'
- PostCSS plugin changed from tailwindcss to @tailwindcss/postcss
- Removed autoprefixer (bundled in v4)
- JS config loaded via @config directive in CSS
- Template classes migrated (e.g., outline-none -> outline-hidden)
- Added v3 border-color compatibility layer

typescript v6:
- Updated ignoreDeprecations from 5.0 to 6.0 in tsconfig.json
- baseUrl deprecated (still functional, silenced via ignoreDeprecations)

Fixes #9741

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: correct BadgeVariant type from 'outline-solid' to 'outline'

The variant type was 'outline-solid' but all callers and the internal
variantClasses map use 'outline'. TypeScript 6 catches this mismatch.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
